channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Crypto Market Structure Bill to Face Key Vote in April and Must Pass by May, Senators Say
item.description: Sen. Bernie Moreno said if the Clarity Act isn’t passed by May, “digital asset legislation will not pass for the foreseeable future.”

item.title: The era of cheap money is over as the Iran war creates a permanent 'inflation floor'
item.description: The Iran war is creating a permanent inflation floor that could end the era of cheap money and expose the fragility of global energy markets.

item.title: ‘We are so close this time‘ — Senator Lummis on market structure bill
item.description: The Wyoming Republican said that the main issue holding up passage of the bill was stablecoin yield, while adding that she believed a provision on DeFi had been ”put to bed.”

item.title: Pudgy Penguins Launched A New Game. Crypto Scammers Made A Fake Version
item.description: Malwarebytes has warned that a phishing campaign is mimicking the Pudgy World game to steal user credentials

item.title: Stripe-Backed Tempo Network Launches With Focus on AI Agent Payments
item.description: Tempo, the layer-1 blockchain backed by payments giant Stripe, launched its mainnet with a clear focus on AI agent payments.

item.title: Bhutan offloads an additional $72.3M Bitcoin amid market downturn
item.description: After the Kingdom of Bhutan's BTC reserve peaked in October 2024, when it held more than 13,000 coins, it has been pared to just 4,400 Bitcoin.

item.title: Citi Downgrades Crypto Exchange Gemini After Cutting Bitcoin, Ethereum Price Targets
item.description: Gemini stock (GEMI) fell 16% on Wednesday following the downgrade and a broader market dip, after Citi cut its Bitcoin and Ethereum targets.

item.title: Bitcoin tests fresh decoupling trade as tech correlation drops to 2018 lows
item.description: BTC price is vastly outperforming the tech-heavy Nasdaq index amid the US–Iran war, but its risks of crashing toward $51,000 persist.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: When price stops working, yield starts mattering
item.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Ruchir Gupta writes on how we’re moving toward a true fixed-income market for crypto-native yield. Then, Clara García Prieto on bitcoin becoming mainstream collateral, but most are not prepare…

item.title: The Protocol: Ethereum community debates foundation’s new mandate document
item.description: Also: World’s AgentKit, Visa and Coinbase on AI agents, and prediction markets + AI.

item.title: Former Binance CEO CZ waves off accusations on Iran, terror ties
item.description: The founder of the world's largest exchange distanced himself from reports about Binance activity that reports had recently suggested aided terrorism.

item.title: Trump-linked American Bitcoin's BTC holdings overtake Mike Novogratz’s Galaxy Digital
item.description: American Bitcoin (ABTC) has climbed to become the 16th-largest bitcoin holder, with 6,899 BTC, as firms compete to build bitcoin treasuries.

item.title: 'Crypto Castle': YouTube Comedy Takes You Back to When Bitcoin Was Just $250
item.description: “The Crypto Castle” takes a look at the early days of Bitcoin—and the "sad evolution" it's undergone since then.

item.title: Crypto exchange Kraken freezes multibillion-dollar IPO plan due to difficult market conditions
item.description: Kraken's parent company filed a draft S-1 registration statement with the SEC in November regarding the proposed initial public offering of its common stock.

item.title: Traders can now bet on the S&P 500 around the clock without ever touching a traditional stock exchange
item.description: S&P Dow Jones Indices licenses its flagship index for crypto trading on Hyperliquid, as perpetual futures gain traction beyond traditional markets.

item.title: Key U.S. senator on crypto market structure bill negotiation: 'We think we've got it'
item.description: Senator Cynthia Lummis, at the center of legislative talks, said the discussion is down to nuance and the bill will finally emerge from her committee in April.

item.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Slip on Inflation Surprise as Oil Prices Jump
item.description: Bitcoin fell alongside U.S. stocks after the world's largest gas field came under attack amid hotter-than-expected inflation data.

item.title: Bitcoin hash rate is tumbling as Iran war lifts energy prices
item.description: A falling hash rate and the resultant pressure on miners could signal another potential capitulation phase, which could push prices down further

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Japan’s SBI VC Trade launches retail USDC lending as stablecoin use grows
item.description: SBI VC Trade said users could lend assets directly to its platform, but added that the company may re-lend funds as part of its operations.

item.title: Crypto industry ties were a liability in Illinois primary
item.description: Ties to the crypto industry became a vector for attack in a recent Democratic primary election in the state of Illinois.

item.title: Circle’s policy chief tells UK to merge MiCA clarity with US stablecoin rules
item.description: The UK has a unique opportunity to merge the best of the EU’s MiCA framework and the US GENIUS Act, Circle’s Dante Disparte told the House of Lords committee on Wednesday.

item.title: Bank of Korea adds two banks to digital won trials as real-world testing begins
item.description: Korea's central bank and nine commercial lenders started real-world testing of deposit tokens, including subsidy payments and peer-to-peer transfers.

item.title: Canadian Regulator Revokes Registrations of 23 Crypto Firms
item.description: Canada's FINTRAC pulled the licenses of multiple money services businesses, in a "significantly increased pace of action."

item.title: Stripe-led payments blockchain Tempo goes live with protocol for AI agents
item.description: The Stripe-led blockchain targets fast, low-cost digital payments and a new Machine Payments Protocol that allows AI agents pay autonomously.

item.title: Bitcoin dips to $72K on hot US PPI inflation hours before Fed FOMC meeting
item.description: Bitcoin price action fell to week-to-date lows with Bitcoin caught between high US inflation and nerves over Fed policy hints at the day's FOMC meeting.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: index falls 3.1% as all constituents trade lower
item.description: Uniswap (UNI) declined 4.9% and Aave (AAVE) dropped 4.4%, leading the index lower.

item.title: Large investors are doubling down on crypto, but getting a lot pickier about risk
item.description: Most institutional investors plan to increase allocations even as concerns around regulation and risk management continue to grow.

item.title: 74% of institutions expect crypto prices to rise in 12 months: Survey
item.description: A Coinbase-EY study reveals institutional investors plan to boost crypto allocations in 2026, favoring regulated products as stablecoins and tokenization gain traction.

item.title: Crypto firms’ open letter urges top US colleges to teach DeFi
item.description: Crypto firms argue that DeFi should be taught at top schools so that students can eventually take on a rapid rise in non-technical crypto jobs on Wall Street.

item.title: JUST IN: $155,000,000 worth of crypto longs liquidated in the past 4 hours. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5ZenBkZmVPT3pLT3RlQ1JYbjBvbXR4VF9BX2R2NldybXFFMVMwa2E5VTBGZnU2b292MEM2OXg0cG1tZ3ZlZzBLZndUeGlLb1pGNTU3MWFYOVpmakZzTUs4d3hB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $155,000,000 worth of cry…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Senator Cynthia Lummis urges lawmakers to pass Bitcoin and crypto market structure legislation ASAP: "This may be our only chance to get market structure done. I can't be any clearer: The time for Clarity is now." 👏 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBUdmhuQVNKTjhjWUxUeTBNYjY4RDg0NE1xLUlIdG9PYnZ5anA4enhWS0Yxcm9wQ1Y1eEYzQlJJa2dycmNycUNHZ0drUWpRWDEwdWhUTkZkVWxtbjN0XzBUTEtTMFBKNms?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Senator Cy…

item.title: RedotPay executive turnover clouds crypto payments firm's $4 billion U.S. IPO ambition
item.description: The company's internal strain, including reports of required long working hours, is overshadowing its push for a U.S. listing.

item.title: 🩸CRASH: 1,000,000,000,000 has been wiped out from Gold and Silver in just 3 HOURS. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFA4U0FJb1E1djJOMzcyQU9PcTVrZE5vM3ZkVWdBQ2FudWdBamc1MW84cnNPd29OcGNOcTloLTlVNW90d2ZKYm5aRHZTREtBZnFHRV9kYWlMOVV4SGlwd09OYm5R?oc=5" target="_blank">🩸CRASH: 1,000,000,000,000 has bee…

item.title: Bitcoin quickly pulls back to $71,000 as Iran fears team up with poor U.S. inflation data
item.description: The price of oil moved higher after reported attacks against Iran's South Pars gas field.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs' $1.2B Streak Hangs in Balance as FOMC Takes Center Stage
item.description: Experts warn that Bitcoin ETF inflows remain "episodic" without policy shifts, ahead of today's FOMC meeting.

item.title: Crypto cards aren't the future, but onchain credit is
item.description: Crypto cards force asset sales and tax hits. Onchain credit enables yield-bearing collateral power spending without liquidation, making cards obsolete interfaces.

item.title: Morning Minute: The SEC & CFTC Declare 'Most Crypto Assets' Are Not Securities
item.description: After a decade of lawsuits, the SEC and CFTC finally wrote the rules for digital assets.

item.title: Forget AGI—Top AI Models Still Struggle With Math
item.description: New benchmark study results show leading AI models still lag humans in visual math reasoning.

item.title: UK lawmakers urge ‘immediate moratorium’ on crypto political donations
item.description: The committee highlighted that the fast payment traits of crypto, along with tools like mixers, tumblers, and AI-assisted splitting of payments below the £500 reporting threshold.

item.title: RedotPay defends team reshuffle amid funding talks and IPO plans
item.description: RedotPay says it restructured teams for efficiency after a Bloomberg report flagged executive turnover, China sensitivities and new funding talks.

item.title: Connecticut suspends Bitcoin Depot as 2026 revenue outlook worsens
item.description: Connecticut halts Bitcoin Depot’s operations, with the company expecting lower revenue in 2026 amid mounting regulatory pressure and a steep decline in its stock price.

item.title: Powell's comments on oil, inflation are likely to guide bitcoin traders
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 18, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin-to-Gold correlation just hit -0.88, the lowest since Nov 2022. This means Bitcoin is moving in the opposite direction with strong intensity. Capital flows into Bitcoin have driven its price up to $74K, while gold has experienced a slight decline. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9STlNHQ3h5eU5pV3ZEZVJxeks3UXg5Vlo1Tm8tYzAyNi1xcEp1aGpNRm5ickZ4V1Z0dTBMdlhMZFFxcWM3SVloakZKX2NrWExLaWY5ZkkzbDQ0cEgzblVBWUtMLWZTbjQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin-to-Gold correlation…

item.title: UK lawmakers seek moratorium on crypto donations to political parties
item.description: A UK parliamentary committee urged an immediate moratorium on crypto political donations until stronger safeguards are in place.

item.title: Bitcoin’s rally runs into 'sell the news' risk ahead of Fed decision
item.description: Two Prime data shows post-meeting weakness dominates, even as markets price a Fed hold and limited rate cuts ahead.

item.title: Bitcoin holds steady at $74,000 as traders turn cautious before Fed meeting
item.description: BTC consolidated with subdued volatility, while derivatives positioning and macro uncertainty signaled cautious market sentiment.

item.title: Tally winds down, citing lack of viable market for DAO tooling
item.description: Tally said its platform served more than one million users, supporting governance across hundreds of organizations and processing over $1 billion in payments.

item.title: Bitcoin stalls at $76K: Key BTC price levels to watch ahead of FOMC
item.description: Bitcoin price traded at $74,000 as investors braced for Jerome Powell’s post-FOMC speech that could see volatile swings toward key BTC price levels.

item.title: Ethereum aims to cut bridge times by 98% to 13 seconds with new rule
item.description: Ethereum’s FCR aims to reduce bridge times by up to 98%, bringing L1-to-L2 and exchange deposits down to 13 seconds without a hard fork.

item.title: Bitcoin is stuck below $75,000 even after landmark SEC, CFTC crypto rules
item.description: Bitcoin remains stuck near key resistance around $75,000, leaving the broader market in limbo.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF inflow streak nears October run, but totals still lag
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs draw $1.2 billion over seven days, far short of October 2025’s nine-day $6 billion streak, as XRP ETFs turn green.

item.title: Open Interest Supports the Stability of Ethereum’s Uptrend “This trend in open interest indicates sustained liquidity inflows into the derivatives market, supporting the stability of Ethereum’s uptrend rather than indicating a temporary move.” – By @ArabxChain - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE96QjhPdGpmeXNwQ2VSOGdZSDZEOWRUaEU4cXBKemIzWkkxV09pR3QxRkQ0cGVuUUktZU9YdmZTWkR0UFRvZF9YUUtJeFF0UmU4N2hVb2FwaGZkUGZ5bnNCWWRjQ3lPeTg?oc=5" target="_blank">Open Interest Supports the …

item.title: Australian crypto shopping surges, but so do banking blocks: Survey
item.description: Online shopping was the leading real-world use case for crypto among Australians, followed by paying for services such as freelancing and video game purchases.

item.title: UK Panel Calls Crypto Donations 'High Risk,' Seeks Immediate Ban
item.description: A cross-party committee has warned that cryptocurrency donations leave UK politics open to foreign interference.

item.title: Key US senator eyes breakthrough for stalled crypto bill this week
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee has been looking to advance its crypto market structure bill since postponing a markup in January.

item.title: Bitcoin Depot Flags Control 'Weaknesses' as Connecticut Halts Its Operations
item.description: Its license was suspended after regulators accused the Bitcoin ATM operator of overcharging kiosk users and failing to provide some refunds.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: 🇺🇸 The United States national debt has officially surpassed 39,000,000,000,000.00 dollars. 27% of the U.S. National Debt is from spending under Trump’s presidencies. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1MOFpKUlJjMFlwRm8zem9sVkhFZXA2RzFEeDN4bDd5ZjBNdlVzQW10NTNyS1JqQTc4dE5KZ0E2WU8wRW5ONWdUMWctX2IzZ1NSVmkwWVpYajE4WjhfSzJNeWxB?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: 🇺🇸 The United States…

item.title: Democrats Press Meta Over Facial Recognition Plans for Smart Glasses
item.description: Lawmakers are citing privacy risks tied to wearable AI and are asking how Meta intends to secure consent from both users and bystanders.

item.title: ⚡️ LATEST: Vitalik Buterin says once Lean Ethereum is fully deployed, $ETH will be the only major chain with both optimal security under synchrony and strong economic finality. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBQTWd2WWxxSjFQWUtRSkFtZVZzb0xFaFBsbGFDazNBS3plYWc3QkNYbHJLOHFmWndSaml0RVBjdW9tWFMyMk5qRUtrWFFzN095bGlVbE5MRDJDb0hFUU9KcWZ6ZzE?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ LATEST: Vitalik Buterin says…
